name: evidence aggregator counts a single organization once even when multiple supporting PRs come from that organization
command: printf '{"pattern_id":"p7","supporting_prs":[{"number":1,"org":"a","tier":1},{"number":2,"org":"a","tier":1},{"number":3,"org":"b","tier":1}]}\n' > pat.json && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/pr-corpus/aggregate-evidence.sh" --pattern pat.json --emit-fields 2>out.txt && grep -q '"evidence_count":3' out.txt && grep -q '"organizations_count":2' out.txt && echo ok 1>&2
